changes.description: Project scaffolding — directory structure, state files, architecture docs, implementation plans
Input source abstraction — Tuner (rtl_fm) and StreamSource (ffmpeg) with auto-detection
Transcriber with faster-whisper CPU fallback (whisper-tiny, int8)
Audio router — HTTP chunked WAV streaming to browser
Flask backend — REST API routes + Socket.IO events for transcripts and signal levels
Console UI — single-page web frontend with preset selector, signal meter, audio player, transcript feed
Frequency presets for Seattle/Redmond area (weather, aviation, marine, public safety, broadcast)
Setup script (setup.sh) — system deps, venv, RTL-SDR, Hailo SDK detection
Hailo-8L NPU inference — mel.py spectrogram, encoder/decoder HEF pipeline via VDevice/InferModel API, 10s chunks, iterative decoder with repetition penalty, tokenizer decode
download_models.sh — fetches encoder/decoder HEF + token embedding npy from Hailo S3
setup.sh — hailo_platform symlink into venv, auto-download model files when Hailo NPU detected
requirements.txt — added torch, transformers dependencies for Hailo inference
Transcriber chunk size from 3s (48k samples) to 10s (160k samples) to match Hailo encoder input
AGPL-3.0 license — copyleft requiring source sharing for modifications and network use
Attributions dashboard page — full dependency table with GitHub repos, licenses, and copyright notices for all third-party projects
README updated with AGPL-3.0 license section and attributions table listing all 13+ dependencies
.nojekyll file to fix GitHub Pages serving of .state/ JSON files
Dashboard navigation — added Attributions link to all pages
Phase 10 implementation plan — ADS-B flight tracking with dump1090, callsign-to-flight correlation from Whisper transcripts, Leaflet.js map panel, single/dual dongle modes
Voice-activity audio segmentation plan — silence-boundary chunking replaces fixed 10s splits, prevents cutting words mid-utterance
Phase 11 implementation plan — inference stats dashboard with encoder/decoder timing, RTF, tokens/s, silence skip rate, frontend stats panel
Phase 8 complete — SDR disconnect detection with auto-recovery on replug, process crash auto-restart (3 retries), /api/retry endpoint, error banner with retry button in UI
Phase 11 complete — inference stats dashboard with encoder/decoder timing, RTF, tokens/s, decoder steps, chunks processed, silence skip rate in UI. GET /api/stats endpoint, periodic 5s broadcast.

Phase 12 implementation plan — NOAA weather radio integration: continuous 162.550 MHz monitoring, NWS broadcast transcript parser (temperature, wind, visibility, alerts, marine forecasts), weather panel UI with priority alert banners, squelch-zero continuous capture mode

Phase 13 implementation plan — NOAA APT satellite imaging: auto-scheduled pass recording for NOAA-15/19 at 137 MHz using ephem + Celestrak TLEs, rtl_fm capture, noaa-apt CLI decoding, satellite panel UI with pass countdown, decoded image display, and image history
